title: PMIGeometricValueTolerance Object
description: Represents a tolerance value that can be associated with a PMIGeometricValue.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: create
methods.description: Create a transient PMIGeometricValueTolerance object. The default value set is to not have tolerances (hasTolerances = false).

methods.name: setDeviation
methods.description: Sets this object to have deviation tolerance with the specified upper and lower values.

methods.name: setLimitsFitsLinear
methods.description: Sets this object to have hole/shaft fit tolerance displayed on one line. The object will also have updated upper and lower tolerance values (used for information only).

methods.name: setLimitsFitsSizeLimits
methods.description: Sets this object to have hole/shaft fit tolerance displayed as size limits. The object will also have updated upper and lower tolerance values (used for information only). Displays the minimum and maximum values in parenthesis.

methods.name: setLimitsFitsStacked
methods.description: Sets this object to have hole/shaft fit tolerance displayed as stacked lines. The object will also have updated upper and lower tolerance values (used for information only).

methods.name: setLimitsFitsTolerance
methods.description: Sets this object to have hole/shaft fit tolerance displayed as tolerance values. The object will also have updated upper and lower tolerance values (used for information only). Displays the upper and lower tolerance values in parenthesis.

methods.name: setLimitsLinear
methods.description: Sets this object to have limits linear tolerance with the specified minimum and maximum values. Displayed as values on one line.

methods.name: setLimitsStacked
methods.description: Sets this object to have limits stacked tolerance with the specified minimum and maximum values. Displayed as stacked lines.

methods.name: setMAX
methods.description: Sets this object to have MAX tolerance type. The tolerance is defined and displayed as MAX.

methods.name: setMIN
methods.description: Sets this object to have MIN tolerance type. The tolerance is defined and displayed as MIN.

methods.name: setSymmetric
methods.description: Sets this object to have symmetric tolerance with the specified value.

properties.name: hasLowerTolerance
properties.description: Gets whether there is a lower tolerance value set.

properties.name: hasShaftToleranceClass
properties.description: Gets whether there is a shaft tolerance class set.

properties.name: hasToleranceClass
properties.description: Gets whether there is a hole tolerance class set.

properties.name: hasTolerances
properties.description: Gets and sets whether the tolerances are set or not on the object.

properties.name: hasToleranceType
properties.description: Gets whether there is tolerance type set.

properties.name: hasUpperTolerance
properties.description: Gets whether there is an upper tolerance value set.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: lowerTolerance
properties.description: Gets the lower tolerance value in cm. Returns 0 if there is no lower tolerance value set.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: shaftToleranceClassDeviation
properties.description: Gets the shaft tolerance class deviation value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class deviation value set.

properties.name: shaftToleranceClassGrade
properties.description: Gets the shaft tolerance class grade value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class grade value set.

properties.name: toleranceClassDeviation
properties.description: Gets the hole tolerance class deviation value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class deviation value set.

properties.name: toleranceClassGrade
properties.description: Gets the hole tolerance class grade value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class grade value set.

properties.name: upperTolerance
properties.description: Gets the upper tolerance value in cm. Returns 0 if there is no upper tolerance value set.

hasShaftToleranceClass.title: PMIGeometricValueTolerance.hasShaftToleranceClass Property
hasShaftToleranceClass.description: Gets whether there is a shaft tolerance class set.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = pMIGeometricValueTolerance_var.hasShaftToleranceClass

shaftToleranceClassDeviation.title: PMIGeometricValueTolerance.shaftToleranceClassDeviation Property
shaftToleranceClassDeviation.description: Gets the shaft tolerance class deviation value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class deviation value set.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = pMIGeometricValueTolerance_var.shaftToleranceClassDeviation

shaftToleranceClassGrade.title: PMIGeometricValueTolerance.shaftToleranceClassGrade Property
shaftToleranceClassGrade.description: Gets the shaft tolerance class grade value. Returns empty string if there is no tolerance class grade value set.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = pMIGeometricValueTolerance_var.shaftToleranceClassGrade
